title: RENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: GRANT COUNTY RENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rental deposit assistance and one-time rent assistance. Program requires an eviction notice or confirmation of homelessness. 530 E Main Street Suite 6 John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Low-income residents at risk of becoming homeless or individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 575-2949 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 575-2949 Amy Smetana [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to fill out a Rental Assistance Inquiry Form. Call for immediate need or more information. In-person appointments are required for the intake process. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Name, date of birth, and Social Security number for all household members ID for all household members age 18 and over Signed Social Security card for all household members age 18 and over Proof of income for the last 30 days for all household members age 18 and over Copy of eviction notice, if applicable Copy of rental agreement, if applicable Third-party homeless certification, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Grant County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Rent Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GRANT COUNTY
